name: Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
- Topping: Beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar and lemon juice to the beaten egg whites. Keep beating until stiff peaks form.
- Cream butter and powdered sugar together until creamy. Add egg yolks, then flour, salt, grated lemon rind, and lemon juice. Mix until a stiff batter forms.
- Spread the batter evenly in an ungreased 9-inch square pan. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
- Beat the topping mixture until stiff peaks form. Spread it over the baked crust.
- Return to oven and bake for another 25 minutes, or until set. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
